ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "construction" INTEGER /* Type of construction (e.g., wood, steel) */,
  "crsdiscount" INTEGER /* Community Rating System (CRS) discount */,
  "deductibleamountinbuildingcoverage" REAL /* Deductible amount for building coverage */,
  "deductibleamountincontentscoverage" REAL /* Deductible amount for contents coverage */,
  "elevatedbuildingindicator" INTEGER /* Indicator for elevated building */,
  "elevationdifference" INTEGER /* Difference in elevation between the building and the base flood elevation */,
  "numberoffloorsininsuredbuilding" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the insured building */,
  "primaryresidenceindicator" INTEGER /* Indicator for primary residence */,
  "smallbusinessindicatorbuilding" INTEGER /* Indicator for small business */,
  "buildingage" INTEGER /* Age of the building */,
  "basementenclosurecrawlspacetype_B" INTEGER /* Indicator for basement enclosure or crawlspace type B */,
  "basementenclosurecrawlspacetype_C" INTEGER /* Indicator for basement enclosure or crawlspace type C */,
  "basementenclosurecrawlspacetype_D" INTEGER /* Indicator for basement enclosure or crawlspace type D */,
  "condominiumindicator_U" INTEGER /* Indicator for condominium type U */,
  "floodzone_AE" INTEGER /* Indicator for flood zone AE */,
  "floodzone_AO" INTEGER /* Indicator for flood zone AO */,
  "floodzone_AOB" INTEGER /* Indicator for flood zone AOB */,
  "locationofcontents_B" INTEGER /* Indicator for location of contents type B */,
  "locationofcontents_C" INTEGER /* Indicator for location of contents type C */,
  "locationofcontents_D" INTEGER /* Indicator for location of contents type D */,
  "locationofcontents_E" INTEGER /* Indicator for location of contents type E */,
  "occupancytype_2" INTEGER /* Indicator for occupancy type 2 */,
  "occupancytype_3" INTEGER /* Indicator for occupancy type 3 */,
  "occupancytype_4" INTEGER /* Indicator for occupancy type 4 */,
  "occupancytype_6" INTEGER /* Indicator for occupancy type 6 */,
  "ratemethod_2" INTEGER /* Indicator for rate method 2 */,
  "ratemethod_B" INTEGER /* Indicator for rate method B */,
  "ratemethod_W" INTEGER /* Indicator for rate method W */,
  "premium_scale" REAL /* Premium scale for the property */,
  "coverage_scale" REAL /* Coverage scale for the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Estimated value of the property */,
  "property_size" REAL /* Size of the property in square feet */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of inspections (e.g., annual, bi-annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_floodzone_AOB FOREIGN KEY ("floodzone_AOB") REFERENCES flood_zones ("flood_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_construction FOREIGN KEY ("construction") REFERENCES construction_types ("construction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_floodzone_AO FOREIGN KEY ("floodzone_AO") REFERENCES flood_zones ("flood_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_basementenclosurecrawlspacetype_C FOREIGN KEY ("basementenclosurecrawlspacetype_C") REFERENCES basement_enclosure_types ("basement_enclosure_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_ratemethod_W FOREIGN KEY ("ratemethod_W") REFERENCES rate_methods ("rate_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_floodzone_AE FOREIGN KEY ("floodzone_AE") REFERENCES flood_zones ("flood_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_occupancytype_6 FOREIGN KEY ("occupancytype_6") REFERENCES occupancy_types ("occupancy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_basementenclosurecrawlspacetype_D FOREIGN KEY ("basementenclosurecrawlspacetype_D") REFERENCES basement_enclosure_types ("basement_enclosure_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_basementenclosurecrawlspacetype_B FOREIGN KEY ("basementenclosurecrawlspacetype_B") REFERENCES basement_enclosure_types ("basement_enclosure_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_ratemethod_B FOREIGN KEY ("ratemethod_B") REFERENCES rate_methods ("rate_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_ratemethod_2 FOREIGN KEY ("ratemethod_2") REFERENCES rate_methods ("rate_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_occupancytype_4 FOREIGN KEY ("occupancytype_4") REFERENCES occupancy_types ("occupancy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_occupancytype_2 FOREIGN KEY ("occupancytype_2") REFERENCES occupancy_types ("occupancy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_occupancytype_3 FOREIGN KEY ("occupancytype_3") REFERENCES occupancy_types ("occupancy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the policy */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the policy */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the policy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "insured_name" TEXT /* Name of the policyholder */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the policyholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the policyholder */,
  "policy_status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the policy status (e.g., why it is expired) */,
  "total_premium" REAL /* Total premium amount for the policy */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coverage */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coverage */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the policy is due for renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_factors" (
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk factor */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_value" TEXT /* Value of the risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_weight" REAL /* Weight of the risk factor in the risk assessment */,
  "risk_factor_score" REAL /* Score assigned to the risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the risk factor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the risk factor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_factors_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was filed */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "claim_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the claim */,
  "claim_status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the claim status (e.g., why it is open) */,
  "claim_amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid out for the claim */,
  "claim_adjuster" TEXT /* Name of the claim adjuster */,
  "adjuster_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the claim adjuster */,
  "claim_file" TEXT /* Path to the claim file (e.g., PDF, images) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., underwriter, risk assessor, policyholder) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Detailed action taken during the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flood_zones" (
  "flood_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flood zone */,
  "flood_zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the flood zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flood zone */,
  "probability_of_flooding" REAL /* Probability of flooding in the flood zone */,
  "historical_flood_data" TEXT /* Path to historical flood data for the flood zone */,
  "flood_risk_rating" TEXT /* Flood risk rating (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flood_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupancy_types" (
  "occupancy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupancy type */,
  "occupancy_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupancy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupancy type */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum occupancy allowed for the property type */,
  "occupancy_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupancy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupancy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "construction_types" (
  "construction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construction type */,
  "construction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the construction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the construction type */,
  "construction_materials" TEXT /* Materials used in the construction */,
  "construction_standards" TEXT /* Standards followed during construction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("construction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_methods" (
  "rate_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate method */,
  "rate_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the rate method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rate method */,
  "rate_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the rate */,
  "rate_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the rate method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "basement_enclosure_types" (
  "basement_enclosure_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each basement enclosure type */,
  "basement_enclosure_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the basement enclosure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the basement enclosure type */,
  "enclosure_materials" TEXT /* Materials used in the enclosure */,
  "enclosure_standards" TEXT /* Standards followed for the enclosure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("basement_enclosure_type_id")
)
